REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1651-1655 Oak Street S.F.)
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for thomas Lucas.

The sale was confirmed at $1,502,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 25, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The amount of the additional bond is to be calculated by Ms. Alavi outisde of the courtroom. Ms. Alavi will notify the Clerk of the correct amount.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Bond in the amount of $1,553,000.00 is required.
